findings.title: No virtualization or pagination for cases
findings.description: loadCases fetches all cases and renderCases assigns tbody.innerHTML from a map over the full array. At 1000+ cases expect large payloads, long main-thread work, and poor scroll performance.
findings.recommendation: Add server-side pagination or virtualized table; cap initial render and lazy-load details.

findings.title: Multi-tab editing is last-write-wins with no conflict detection
findings.description: State is only in-memory per tab. CRUD operations do not send or check revision tokens. Two tabs can overwrite each other without notice.
findings.recommendation: ETag/If-Match on mutating APIs, periodic refresh or focus-based reload.

findings.title: api() surfaces rough or lossy error messages
findings.description: Non-OK responses stringify detail or whole body; FastAPI validation errors often serialize as long JSON arrays.
findings.recommendation: Normalize FastAPI errors client-side; if JSON parse fails, use res.status and a short snippet.

findings.title: CRUD modal sends raw field values with little client validation
findings.description: saveCrudModal reads .value without trim for feature/persona/rule/case names. Empty strings rely on server 400.
findings.recommendation: Mirror server rules in the UI (trim, required, max length hints).

findings.title: Silent failure when GET /cases fails
findings.description: In loadCases, catch clears allCases and hides content without toast.
findings.recommendation: Toast the error so network/permission failures are visible.

findings.title: Browser close during run: no in-flight recovery
findings.description: runExecution awaits POST /run with 30s timeout. Closing tab aborts fetch; server may still run. No beforeunload warning.
findings.recommendation: Optional beforeunload when running; persist run_id and show link to history.

findings.title: Special characters and long input
findings.description: esc() used for text nodes; very long strings hurt DOM size. Unicode generally OK.
findings.recommendation: Optional maxLength on inputs aligned with backend limits.

findings.title: API tests miss GUI-relevant edge cases
findings.description: Gaps: empty/whitespace strings, extremely long title, unicode edge cases, concurrent PUT race.
findings.recommendation: Parametrize CRUD tests for empty, unicode, and oversized payloads.

overall_impression: Strong API coverage in pytest. Front-end validation, scale, and multi-tab behavior are weak or untested.
